name: Linear for Startups
summary: Issue tracking and project planning tool offer for early-stage teams.
benefits: Up to 6 months free on Basic or Business plans
Access to Cycles, roadmaps, and project planning features
Integration with Figma, GitHub, and Slack
eligibility: Affiliated with an official Linear partner
